case_title: TIMOTHY IFEANYI AJAEGBU VS. RAUL CESAR RODRIGUEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 57307116)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-21-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-21-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-10-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AJAEGBU, TIMOTHY IFEANYI AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, RAUL CESAR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-29-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-27-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-06-2015
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-29-2015 CONTINUED TO JUN-10-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 57137349), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AJAEGBU, TIMOTHY IFEANYI SERVED FEB-17-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, RAUL CESAR
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 56836299), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AJAEGBU, TIMOTHY IFEANYI SERVED FEB-17-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, RAUL CESAR
